directive:
C4851 Lead supervision — HEAD UNCHANGED at 29a9911 since C4850. Workers idle since 16:21:50 (Bolt #497), 16:11:09 (Trace), 15:58:13 (Sage) — C4850 directive landed 16:30:54 but NO tasks dispatched in ~7min window (session manager cadence, not a lane issue). Re-affirming C4850 lane assignments this cycle; scope fully unchanged. ALL MONITORS FRESH (comgate/cz-competitors 6.3h/168h, vinted-cz-media 6.3h/720h) — skip. Lane recap: Bolt IDLE (hard-rule — no clean backlog, do-not-invent); Trace #484 PERF-VERIFY on jvsatnik.cz then #367 fold-in (4 commits: a48e58f/767966d/fafa947/29a9911); Sage #494 Phase 2 (11 DOCTYPE builders → renderLayout, atomic commits); Guard #368 P0 ttyd. Lint 0w/0e MILESTONE holds at 20 consecutive commits through 29a9911. Bectly flags carry forward unchanged: (a) confirm SMTP #493 live-in-prod vs Resend transport fallback, (b) #496 Phase 3/4 ship-intent decision, (c) three standing env/DB gates (SMTP_*/IMAP_*/prisma db push + db:sync-turso). Logged cycle row in devloop_cycles. No directive change, no lane rotation, no force_next_task updates — pure dispatch-refresh cycle. C4850 previous directive retained below for reference:

---

C4850 Lead supervision — NEW HEAD 29a9911 (Bolt C4849 second commit shipped #497 AFTER the prior C4850 directive was issued — closing #497 this run). #497 scope delivered cleanly: src/lib/email.ts now uses existing getBaseUrl() helper (24 baseUrl consts consolidated + line 903 NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL typo fixed) + swept 16 other src/ files (structured-data, layout, sitemap, robots, 3 feeds, 2 collections, 2 products, 3 admin actions, similar-item, campaign-sender placeholder) replacing stale `https://janicka-shop.vercel.app` → `https://jvsatnik.cz`. `grep janicka-shop.vercel.app src/` now returns 0. tsc 0 err, lint 0w/0e (MILESTONE preserved 20 consecutive commits), build green. HEAD chain C4845→C4850: 74f3c55 #481 → 41b7c43 #483 → 42d60d5 #482 → 436e33e #492 → 6e2b580 #493 → 9c23a71 #494 P1 → 1ad180d #495 → a48e58f Trace audit → 767966d redeploy → fafa947 #496 P1+P2 → 29a9911 #497. Lane-discipline: Bolt shipped #497 as its own atomic commit (scope-respected this time) — C4848 block-violation + C4849 observation #2 closed out; Bolt cleanly delivered the requested scaffold-caliber cleanup in the next worker slot after directive propagated. Closing observation pattern unless it recurs. DIRECTIVE CHANGE THIS CYCLE — Bolt: IDLE (do NOT invent cleanup). Rationale: (1) #497 done, (2) #496 Phase 3+4 HARD-GATED on bectly mailhosting/IMAP env/prisma db push (unchanged gates), (3) lint 0w/0e milestone clean, ts-prune clean per C4832/C4833, (4) Sage owns email visual (#494), (5) Guard owns security (#368/#366/#330). Confirming hard-rule from prior directive: if Bolt has no clean actionable task this cycle, worker MUST idle — NOT invent cleanup. Trace: #484 PERF-VERIFY UNCHANGED — replay on LIVE prod at https://jvsatnik.cz. Pre-flight: wait ≥5min post-29a9911 propagation (commit timestamp 18:21 local / ~16:21 UTC; current 16:27 — may need brief wait if Vercel build still propagating), curl -I https://jvsatnik.cz | grep x-vercel-id for fresh build hash, then replay 10 Lighthouse 13.1 runs (5 routes × mobile+desktop, prod, cold-cache, 3 medians) → docs/audits/cwv-2026-04-24-followup.md. THEN #367 sweep fold-in — commits to batch-verify since last #367 entry: a48e58f, 767966d, fafa947, 29a9911 (four commits). Checklist extensions for fafa947 retained (Prisma models feature-flagged, /api/cron/email-sync CRON_SECRET-gated, /admin/mailbox auth middleware, imapflow+mailparser license check MIT/MIT-0, server actions use 'use server' + auth + revalidatePath, no PII in IMAP logger). Additional for 29a9911: (G) no BASE_URL magic strings re-introduced anywhere in src/ (grep should return 0 for `janicka-shop.vercel.app`), (H) getBaseUrl() single source of truth pattern preserved — no alternate BASE_URL constants introduced elsewhere. Sage: #494 Phase 2 UNCHANGED — 11 raw DOCTYPE builders at src/lib/email.ts lines 737/1124/1361/1466/1623/1731/1836/1925/2072/2239/2582 → renderLayout, one builder per commit (or two if trivial <30 LoC each), marketing-class keeps unsubscribe footer, transactional skips, lint 0w/0e milestone preserved on every commit. Guard: #368 SEC-2 P0 UNCHANGED (ttyd credential leak in ps → Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion header validation). Monitors: comgate-version 6.2h/168h, cz-competitors 6.2h/168h, vinted-cz-media 6.2h/720h — ALL FRESH, none DUE this cycle, skipping. BECTLY FLAGS (carry forward from C4850 prev): (a) C4845 commit 767966d says 'Resend verified' for jvsatnik.cz — confirm whether SMTP migration #493 is actually live in prod or if prod still routes via Resend transport despite nodemailer code; determines whether inbound IMAP mailbox (#496) can share mailhosting or needs separate provisioning. (b) #496 Phase 3+4 ship decision: compose/reply + order-linking next Bolt rotation after mailhosting picked, or pause mailclient post-Phase 1 and pivot Bolt to other backlog? (c) Vercel env apply (#493 SMTP_*) + campaign dry-run smoke-test + IMAP_* env + prisma db push + db:sync-turso still pending.

BOLT.notes: IDLE this cycle — no clean actionable task. #497 SHIPPED in 29a9911 (C4849 second commit): src/lib/email.ts now uses getBaseUrl() for 24 baseUrl consts + line 903 typo fixed + 16 other src/ files swept, `grep janicka-shop.vercel.app src/` returns 0, tsc 0 / lint 0w/0e (MILESTONE 20 consecutive) / build green. #496 Phase 3 (compose/reply) + Phase 4 (order linking + DOMPurify + R2 signed DL for attachments) remain HARD-GATED on bectly: (a) mailhosting pick for @jvsatnik.cz (Resend inbound dead post-C4845 FROM switch), (b) IMAP_HOST/IMAP_PORT/IMAP_USER/IMAP_PASS + SMTP_* env in Vercel, (c) prisma db push + db:sync-turso to apply C4849 EmailThread/Message/Attachment models. Until those three gates clear, Bolt has no #496 work. No other open BOLT tasks exist (backlog: #85/#86/#87 all blocked low-priority, no scaffold-caliber cleanup available — lint 0w/0e clean, ts-prune clean per C4832/C4833, perf trio #481/#482/#483 shipped, email brand Phase 1 shipped by Sage). DO NOT invent cleanup tasks. DO NOT re-open prior DONE tasks (hard_rules lists 60+ DONE ids). DO NOT touch Sage surface (#494 layout.ts/email templates), Guard surface (#368/#366/#330 security), Trace surface (#484/#367 audits). If a P0/P1 defect reaches DevChat or a NEW Trace audit finding lands mid-cycle, Lead will re-activate this lane with a fresh force_next_task — until then, worker idles. Standing bectly gates (recap): SMTP_* env apply (#493) + campaign dry-run smoke-test still pending; IMAP_* env + mailhosting pick (#496) still pending; prisma db push + db:sync-turso for new EmailThread/Message/Attachment models still pending. Stability surfaces — do NOT modify: smtp-transport.ts getMailer/FROM_DEFAULT, src/lib/email/addresses.ts FROM map, layout.ts renderLayout signature, C4849 IMAP lib + cron route + mailbox UI, the hoisted getBaseUrl() usage introduced in 29a9911.

Next activation when (a) bectly clears #496 gates, or (b) new Trace audit produces P0/P1 finding, or (c) new DevChat bug reaches backlog, or (d) bectly assigns fresh scope.

TRACE.notes: PICK #484 [PERF-VERIFY] NEXT — prod domain changed: run Lighthouse on https://jvsatnik.cz (NOT janicka-shop.vercel.app — 767966d redeploy switched FROM to @jvsatnik.cz and prod is now Cloudflare-fronted jvsatnik.cz). Checklist extensions for fafa947: (A) new Prisma models EmailThread/Message/Attachment are feature-flagged and DON'T load unless IMAP_* env set (verify getImapClient returns null without env), (B) /api/cron/email-sync/route.ts requires CRON_SECRET header match (verify 401 without header), (C) /admin/mailbox routes covered by (admin)/ auth middleware, (D) imapflow+mailparser added to package.json (check lockfile + license — imapflow MIT, mailparser MIT-0), (E) server actions (archive/trash/flag/unread) use 'use server' + auth check + revalidatePath, (F) no PII leaked into logger calls in IMAP lib. Standing checklist (unchanged): tsc clean, lint 0w/0e (MILESTONE 20 consecutive through 29a9911), @ts-ignore=0, dangerouslySetInnerHTML stable, devchat grep clean, resend grep stays clean, nodemailer single-factory intact, layout.ts exports consumed. Append C4850 entry to docs/audits/codebase-sweep-2026-04-18.md. Keep chunks <2min to dodge QA exit=143. Skip #358 (BLOCKED Guard #368), #351 (older), #342/#340/#347 (Hetzner-gated).

SAGE.notes: PICK #494 NEXT — Phase 2 of email brand redesign. Phase 1 SHIPPED (9c23a71): layout.ts created + 10 templates migrated to renderLayout (order-confirmation, payment-confirmed, 4 order-status flows, shipping-notification, newsletter-welcome, email-change-verify, email-change notice, account-deleted, wishlist-sold). REMAINING in src/lib/email.ts — 11 raw `<!DOCTYPE html>` builders at lines 737/1124/1361/1466/1623/1731/1836/1925/2072/2239/2582. Map each builder to renderLayout({preheader, contentHtml}) or a `buildEmailLayout`-style helper from layout.ts. Expected builders: line 737 admin-new-order, 1124 newsletter/welcome-variant, 1361 review-request, 1466 delivery-check, 1623 new-arrival, 1731 browse-abandonment, 1836 cross-sell-follow-up, 1925 win-back, 2072 campaign, 2239 MOTHERS_DAY_BUILDERS (5 emails), 2582 CUSTOMS_BUILDERS (n emails). APPROACH: one builder per commit (OR two per commit if trivial <30 lines each) — keep atomic to dodge QA exit=143, preserve lint 0w/0e MILESTONE on every commit. For each builder: (1) lift innerContent out of the DOCTYPE shell, (2) feed through renderLayout with matching preheader/title/eyebrow/CTA props, (3) ensure Czech diacritics + unsubscribe link are preserved (campaign/newsletter/browse-abandonment/win-back/cross-sell/MOTHERS_DAY/CUSTOMS are marketing-class → MUST have unsubscribe footer), (4) transactional (admin-new-order, review-request, delivery-check, new-arrival) skip unsubscribe. Commit fmt: 'Cycle #NNNN: Sage — Task #494 Phase 2a/2b/...: migrated <builder-name> to renderLayout. tsc 0, lint 0w/0e (milestone preserved), build green.'. DO NOT touch layout.ts structural API (renderLayout signature — Phase 1 stability surface). DO NOT touch smtp-transport.ts (Bolt #493). DO NOT re-add Resend. DO NOT touch non-email files (homepage sections #481, cookie-banner #483, product-gallery #482, PDP sold layout #489, globals.css lightbox #488, invoice generators #490, jarvis-remote-frame #492). When all 11 migrated → mark #494 COMPLETE and Lead closes next cycle.
SAGE.source_finding: Phase 1 shipped 9c23a71: 8 renderLayout call-sites + 272-line layout.ts. 11 raw `<!DOCTYPE html>` builders remain in email.ts (grep-verified).

Sage, Trace, Guard MUST NOT wait on Hetzner DNS/certbot (#329) or daemon boot (#334) — they have independent lanes.
Bolt owns all Hetzner migration code paths (nginx/pm2/env/redis/bullmq/systemd); other agents do not touch them.
Task #375 was rejected (C4386 f8cf472) — do not reopen without fresh production repro.
QA worker exit=143 pattern: keep Sage + Trace tasks atomic (<2min execution, single-purpose) until root cause diagnosed.

#342/#340/#347 all gated on Bolt P1-P4 Hetzner app deploy + bectly pre-approval + off-peak — Trace must NOT attempt ad-hoc prod failover/perf/restore drills.
#466 Bolt fix: per-site eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/purity is acceptable; do NOT introduce a file-level or project-level disable of react-hooks/purity.

#467 Bolt fix: per-site eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/set-state-in-effect is acceptable; do NOT introduce a file-level or project-level disable — each site must carry its own single-line justification comment.

#469 Bolt fix: argsIgnorePattern/varsIgnorePattern for ^_ prefix is a RULE CONFIGURATION extension (documented TS-ESLint convention), NOT a rule disable. Scope must be strict: only affects @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, only adds the two pattern options, only ^_ prefix. Do NOT blanket-disable the rule. Do NOT add per-file overrides.

Lint 0w/0e MILESTONE (C4829 first clean state, preserved through 6e2b580 = ~16 consecutive commits): every Bolt commit going forward MUST verify `npm run lint` returns 0 warnings 0 errors before claiming done. Regressing this milestone is a hard fail — fix-forward in same commit, do not ship.

#481 perf task ships as its OWN commit (not bundled) so #484 Trace verify can attribute deltas per-task. Commit format: 'Cycle #NNNN: Bolt — Task #NNN: <one-line>. tsc clean, lint 0w/0e (milestone preserved), build green.'.

#497 DONE (29a9911) — email.ts + 16 other src/ files now use getBaseUrl() for BASE_URL (24 consts consolidated in email.ts + typo `NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL` fixed at former line 903). `grep janicka-shop.vercel.app src/` returns 0. getBaseUrl() is the single source of truth for BASE_URL. When a new server/route needs BASE_URL, import from the shared helper — do not inline.

#493 DONE (6e2b580) — Resend→nodemailer SMTP migration. Single-factory getMailer in src/lib/email/smtp-transport.ts (lazy singleton, FROM_DEFAULT constant, graceful null when env absent). 24 send-sites rewritten. resend dep removed from package.json. nodemailer@^7.0.7 + @types/nodemailer added. Privacy page sub-processor entry removed. Do NOT re-add Resend dep, `new Resend` instances, or RESEND_API_KEY refs. getMailer signature + FROM_DEFAULT constant are a stability surface — Sage #494 restyles TEMPLATE JSX/styles only, not the transport wrapper. Pending bectly: Vercel env apply (SMTP_HOST/SMTP_PORT/SMTP_USER/SMTP_PASS/SMTP_FROM) + smoke-test via admin campaign dry-run.
